business.type_label: spiritual healing salon & therapist training school

engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells defined expertise delivered by named, credentialed practitioners (channeling, hypnotherapy, reiki) plus certification training; the decision is trusting these therapists, carried by 18 outcome testimonials, founder lineage, and certification framing rather than a browsable body of work.

goal.one_action: submit a contact/inquiry (about a session or a course) via the linked form; direct reservation is otherwise made by contacting a therapist

structure.archetype_note: Practitioner-collective site: shared brand hub plus one branded subpage per therapist/location; pricing centralized on menu-price, proof centralized on voice, conversion funneled to a single external Tally contact form.

mapped.observed_as: 心と魂を癒すヒーリングサロン 〜受け継がれた光の叡智〜
Therapists - セラピストの紹介
Menu - セッション内容・料金 / メニュー＆料金 pricing tables
School - 講座内容・料金 / 受講できるセラピーとコース内容
お問合せ / Tally inquiry form
体験談 (金運/人間関係/恋愛/仕事/健康 お客様の声)

unmapped.observed: Per-therapist / per-location branded subpages (LC 東京 佐和, LC埼玉 実貴恵, LC大阪 村上 悠子)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Closed section list has no id for a set of individual practitioner profile pages within a collective; it is structural (many subpages), not a single on-page section.

proposed_new.name: practitioner-profiles
proposed_new.evidence: Nav and homepage introduce three named therapists across Tokyo/Saitama/Osaka, each with its own branded subpage (/sawa, /mikie, /murakami) plus a founder-history page; reservations route to individual therapists. A multi-practitioner directory with per-person subpages is not expressible via team-less closed vocab.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=rendered (not full) and therapist subpages + FAQ page were not individually crawled (6-page cap), so per-practitioner detail is inferred from nav; core engine/goal/pricing evidence is solid.

gap_findings: No capability expresses a multi-practitioner / multi-location profile set (each therapist a branded subpage, reservation delegated per-person) — proposed practitioner-profiles.

Conversion is a plain external Tally contact form: a delegated `form` mechanism, not a booking capability — but the closed vocab's `lead-form` implies an ON-page form, so an off-site contact-form handoff sits between lead-form and external-* siblings without an exact fit.
Pricing lives on one page while the courses it prices live on another (school page shows no prices) — no section model links a features/course page to a remote pricing table.
